ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Administrative_Review_A__c), NOT($Permission.Administrative_Review_Team), $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', OR( Project__r.strk__Project_Template__c != 'US Collocation', AND( Project__r.strk__Project_Template__c = 'US Collocation', OR( Project__r.Monthly_Income__c != 0, AND( Project__r.Monthly_Income__c = 0, Administrative_Review_A__c <> DATE(1900, 1, 1) ) ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Administrative Review Actual Date can be updated only by Administrative review team. Please contact System Administrator.
